skillTree.localised_description: The turbulent Winds of Magic can do little harm to those who have found harmony amidst its raging currents.
The best way to repel the chaotic flurry of missile fire is to meet it with order, discipline, and a stalwart row of shields.
Who wants to live forever? As it turns out, most beings wouldn't say no…

effects.description: This Lord will be wounded instead of killed in battle

skillTree.localised_description: Having learned much in their long years of service, this character now turns their attention to training others.

effects.description: Character will share +10% of experience earned between all other active Lords

skillTree.localised_description: A predator need not be savage in their approach. Skill and precision ends a hunt just as effectively as unbridled aggression.

attributes.bullet_text: This unit frightens all enemy units, reducing their leadership when nearby. It is also immune to fear. Fear penalties do not stack.

skillTree.localised_description: As they burn from without, these warriors' inner fire is not quenched. What is more, it drives them to ever greater acts of savagery.

attributes.bullet_text: This unit can cause terror, making its melee target rout for a short time. Units that cause terror are immune to terror and fear themselves.

skillTree.localised_description: The ancient martial traditions of the Sawai mandate techniques of finesse which demand complete fluidity of defensive posture.

effects.description:
Melee defence: +6 for Iron Claw Tiger Warrior units
	(Lord's army)

Missile resistance: 15% for Iron Claw Tiger Warrior units
	(Lord's army)

skillTree.localised_description: Through deep introspection developed from the ascetic practices of old Ind, one can utilise mind-over-matter techniques to harden pauldrons and sharpen axes.

effects.description:
Melee attack: +4 for Tiger Warrior Sawai Lords and Iron Claw Tiger Warrior units
	(Lord's army)

Bonus vs Large: +5 for Tiger Warrior Sawai Lords and Iron Claw Tiger Warrior units
	(Lord's army)

Weapon strength: +10% for Tiger Warrior Sawai Lords and Iron Claw Tiger Warrior units
	(Lord's army)

skillTree.localised_description: The Sawai are not just battle commanders, but elite warrior-nobles bound by ancient codes, whose authority buttresses the very souls of those they command.
The greatest Sawai ignite heroic hearts with their elaborate and manifold fighting techniques. To master Sawai traditions is to embody perfection in combat.

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit frightens all enemy units, reducing their leadership when nearby. It is also immune to fear. Fear penalties do not stack.

effects.description:
Passive ability: "Fight Fire with Fire" for embedded Heroes
	(Lord's army)

attributes.bullet_text: This unit can cause terror, making its melee target rout for a short time. Units that cause terror are immune to terror and fear themselves.

skillTree.localised_description: Hand-to-hand combat is a lethal match of cut and thrust. However, it’s not all about offensive strikes; parries and other defensive moves can also win the day.
Some creatures charge home with such fury that the very ground shakes beneath their feet.
Full-Plate armour protects the wearer from head-to-foot. Many such suits are blessed or imbued with arcane abilities.
The scars on this storied warrior reveal a veteran of many battles, a being not easy to kill and one worthy of respect and fear.
A deadly blade is especially lethal when in the hands of this master death-maker, killer and slaughterer!
From one bloodied, lifeless corpse to the next, this one is always looking for the next adversary to best.
Such is their power and ferocity, a wound-maker will ravage the foe, cutting and pulverising until there is only one exit - death.
This warrior is one with their blade; it is an extension of their will, making them a worthy foe in combat.
The iron will and indomitable presence of this leader ensures their followers remain steadfast when facing peril.
A blade that sings in defence will not let its wielder be penetrated.
There are Lords that radiate power, confidence and fear, inspiring their followers to great or terrible acts.

effects.description:
Unit experience gain per turn: +100
	(Lord's army)

skillTree.localised_description: The Dragon Emperor guides every sword and spear of the northern provinces, inspiring a strength of arms to match an unflinching strength of will.

skillTree.localised_description: Those who know the land and its secrets will travel faster and further than the foes who don't.
This Lord expects utter obedience from the smallfolk, and has little time for insurrections or petty revolts.
All warriors of honour and pride are eager to fight under the Dragon-Emperor's banners.

	(Lord's army)

skillTree.localised_description: Through our acts, the gods will cleanse the lands.
Every wound that is not fatal is but a lesson to learn from.

skillTree.localised_description: "The time to strike is now!"

skillTree.localised_description: A good quartermaster can ration equipment and foodstuffs efficiently, making supplies last longer.
Proficient with figures, this Lord, or his subordinates, can keep his army fulfilled, even in dire circumstances.
Countless conflicts and a keen sense of awareness have made this Lord difficult to entrap.

effects.description: Chance of intercepting an army using Tunnelling, beast-paths or Worldroots: +5%
Chance of intercepting an army using Tunnelling, beast-paths or Worldroots: +10%

skillTree.localised_description: The blood-soaked battlefields of the northern provinces are the proving grounds upon which the mightiest warriors of Cathay have honed their craft.

effects.description: Hero self-defence: +25% chance of wounding aggressors

Recruit rank: +1 for all units
	(Lord's army)

attributes.bullet_text: When bracing, this unit negates the charge bonus of any large attacker.
When bracing, this unit causes additional damage when attacking charging enemies.
This unit provides a leadership bonus to nearby allies. Units within range of both the Lord's aura and an encouraging unit will receive the larger of the two bonuses.
This unit can hide in forests until enemy units get too close.

A Tiger Warrior unit has:
	 ➕ Increased  Speed
	 ➕ Increased  Charge Bonus
	 ➕ Ferocious Ambush ability

backgroundSkills.localised_description: Despite their stark animalistic appearance, Tiger Warriors are far from savages, and loath those of that ilk.
Even a clawed grip can wield a weapon with supreme consistency and skill.

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can never have its Melee Attack reduced during battle.

backgroundSkills.localised_description: "When the tranquillity of calm isn't enough, do not unleash your inner beast – embrace it."

enabled_if: Leadership is higher than 50% of base

attributes.bullet_text: The unit is immune to psychological attacks (Fear & Terror).

backgroundSkills.localised_description: "Those who harm the innocent deserve the judgement of the claw!"
If knowledge is power, then this one is powerful indeed.

effects.description: Magic item drop chance from battle: +15%

backgroundSkills.localised_description: When the arrows are spent and the blades are all blunted, this perfect warrior can rely on their well-trained body to keep death from their door.
The unseen predator is not always the only one to catch their prey, but they are often the first.

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can move hidden in any terrain.

backgroundSkills.localised_description: "The trick is to think two steps ahead… and then think one step ahead of that."

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can deploy outside the deployment zone.

backgroundSkills.localised_description: This one could challenge an Ogre to an arm-wrestling match.
Patience may be a virtue, but some simply cannot afford to wait.

effects.description:
Ambush success chance: +10%
	(armies in local owned region)

attributes.bullet_text: Entities with this attribute double their charge bonus when attacking the rear or flank of an entity.

backgroundSkills.localised_description: No being can kill what it cannot catch.

related_attributes.bullet_text: Speed and combat penalties caused by terrain are ignored by this unit.

attributes.bullet_text: Speed and combat penalties caused by terrain are ignored by this unit.

backgroundSkills.localised_description: A dashing scar completes any true warrior's look.
